title: A2UI Rich Catalog
description: An extension catalog that adds a Markdown-aware RichChoicePicker component and a path-based map lookup function on top of the A2UI basic catalog.

allOf.description: A richer choice picker that renders its label and each option description as Markdown. It supports both rich card layouts and select-style pickers where the selected state can also show label and description content.

label.description: The heading shown above the choice group. Plain text is valid, but the renderer may interpret Markdown formatting.

variant.description: Controls whether the user can pick one option or many options.

displayStyle.description: Controls whether options render as rich cards or as a compact select-style picker. `card` keeps the rich card list presentation. `select` uses a popup-based single-select, combobox, or multi-select checklist depending on `variant` and `filterable`.

options.description: The list of available options to choose from.

value.description: The selected value or values stored in the data model.

filterable.description: Controls visible search UI. `card` + `true` shows a separate inline filter above the card list. `select` + `true` merges search into the popup for searchable combobox or multi-select panel behavior. `false` renders no visible search UI.

get.description: Returns the property named by `key` from the object provided by `value` or loaded from `valuePath`. This is useful for projecting one field from the result of another function such as `map`.

value.description: Alias for `valuePath`, or a nested function call that resolves to an object.

key.description: The property name to read from the source object.

map.description: Looks up the dataset at `datasetPath` (or `dataset`) and returns the first entity whose `key` property matches the value found at `valuePath` (or `value`). Both path arguments accept absolute JSON Pointer paths or relative paths scoped to the current base path.

valuePath.description: Path to the value to match against the dataset.

datasetPath.description: Path to the dataset to search.

key.description: The property name on each dataset entity to compare.

label.description: The label to display for this option. Plain text is valid, but the renderer may interpret Markdown formatting.

description.description: Additional Markdown-aware helper text shown under the label for this option.

value.description: The stable value associated with this option.
